title: An Impossible Gathering
lines: Inside the palace, you find a world that shouldn't exist. Large night fires burn without smoke, casting a warm glow over a crowd of robed figures.
They offer you dates and cool water, and for the first time in weeks, you hear laughter. There isn't a zombie in sight.
On a silk rug in the courtyard, an old man beckons you over. Behind him, several colorful carpets seem to be hovering inches off the ground.
